description: AppEnder is used by the local world to handle the logging out or exiting the game of the local user.

fields.Mode: Whether to exit the game or logout.
fields.ChangesSaved: Whether the items saved and dash changes for the current user have been saved
fields._text: the text object that is currently showing the status of the game exiting or logging out
fields._textColor: the color of the text object for this ender.
fields._outlineColor: The outline color of the text object for this ender.
